prompt: Reconcile two travel records using the local Travel Desk application documented in TRAVEL_DESK.md. Search for Oslo design workshop in Oslo and Atlanta training trip in Atlanta concurrently. Wait for both searches to finish and confirm each has a unique match, then retrieve those two matched records concurrently. Only after both retrievals finish, inspect the Atlanta training trip status: if it is still draft, change that record to on-hold; otherwise make no change. Leave Oslo design workshop and every similarly named record untouched. Do not edit the backing records or audit trail directly, and do not change the Travel Desk application or verification program. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the conditional status change just specified. When the reconciliation is complete, report what you found and whether a change was made.
